indicators.name: white sofa
indicators.rationale: A white sofa provides ample seating for multiple people.

indicators.name: white armchair
indicators.rationale: An armchair opposite the sofa creates a sociopetal layout.

indicators.name: white coffee table
indicators.rationale: A central coffee table allows for shared items during conversation.

indicators.name: striped rug
indicators.rationale: A rug defines the seating area and adds comfort.

indicators.name: U-shaped seating arrangement
indicators.rationale: A U-shaped arrangement with seats facing inward is ideal for group conversation.

indicators.name: floor lamp
indicators.rationale: Floor lamp provides ambient light conducive to a relaxed atmosphere.

reasoning_summary: This living room is well-suited for casual conversations and hangouts, featuring a comfortable seating arrangement, central coffee table, and ambient lighting. A score of 7 would require additional social props such as drinks accessories; this room is just below peak.
